# ctyun_mysql_parameters (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10033813/10035295





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) mysql实例id

### Optional

- `page_no` (Number) 页码，默认1
- `page_size` (Number) 每页记录数，默认10
- `project_id` (String) 项目ID
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，默认使用provider配置

### Read-Only

- `parameters` (Attributes List) 实例参数列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--parameters))

<a id="nestedatt--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parameters`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) 参数描述
- `parameter_id` (Number) 参数id
- `parameter_name` (String) 参数名
- `parameter_value` (String) 参数值，支持更新
- `permit_value` (String) 允许取值范围
- `restart` (Boolean) 修改配置是否需要重启
- `value_type` (String) 参数类型
